refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms for operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrated task management system for planning and scheduling.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and feedback interface for operator awareness.
selected_dp.selected_dp: Combination of DP1, DP2, and DP3 to address the refined FRs holistically.

potential_sources: Interdependency between vehicle control and task management.
Data exchange requirements between telemetry and control systems.
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically coupled but can be modularized to minimize tight coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable network link for telemetry and tasking data exchange.
Risk of performance degradation if real-time feedback latency is high.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and modular separation to manage coupling.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including vehicle control, task management, and telemetry feedback.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Bi-directional data flow for real-time performance monitoring and control feedback.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Input of task plans and schedules from external planning systems.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Output alerts to Safety Services module for safety-critical notifications.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication backbone supporting data exchange among modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as it integrates all DPs; low diffusion due to centralized architecture.
Contains vehicle control DP but less scope for task management and telemetry.
Supports remote control but limited direct role in productivity optimization.
Primarily focused on safety alerts, minimal containment of productivity DPs.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DPs within the NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports integrated optimization.
containment_risks: Potential complexity and size of NGHE Solution module may impact maintainability.
Risk of bottlenecks if interfaces are not well defined.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider sub-module decomposition within NGHE Solution to manage complexity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well defined and mapped to logical DPs that address the productivity requirement comprehensively.

diffusion_risks: Centralized NGHE Solution module may lead to diffusion if not properly modularized.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor NGHE Solution as the primary module for implementation.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via integrated system tests measuring productivity KPIs and interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of DPs to NGHE Solution module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define sub-modules within NGHE Solution to reduce complexity.
Clarify interface protocols for Telemetry and Tasking to ensure robust integration.

decision.justification: The current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment meets the criteria for progressing to detailed design and implementation.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize throughput.
FR2: Support effective task planning and execution to minimize idle time.
FR3: Provide real-time performance monitoring and feedback to operators.

revise.why: No major issues identified requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Reliable network infrastructure for data exchange.
Operators and tele-operators will utilize feedback systems effectively.
open_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module integration.
Latency in telemetry data affecting real-time feedback.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype or simulation demonstrating productivity targets.
Interface validation tests between NGHE Solution and external modules.
